subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy letter arrived, but thou knowest not what transpireth. Not a moment's peace have I, by day or by night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم نامه شما رسید ولی نمیدانی چه خبر است دقیقه ای شب و روز آرام ندارم
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @poems and quotation from poetry
